svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="gwyfPVto3OYyjQZAuqhD"> <mxGraphModel dx="872" dy="473" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="none" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml MovieTicketBooking_HighLevel_Architecture

' ===== STYLE =====
skinparam componentStyle uml2
skinparam rectangleBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam rectangleBorderColor #333333
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam arrowThickness 2

title High-Level System Architecture

' ===== CLIENT LAYER =====
rectangle \"Client Layer\" as CL #E3F2FD {
 actor \"Web Browser\" as WEB
 actor \"Mobile App\" as MOB
}

' ===== API GATEWAY =====
rectangle \"API Gateway\" as AG #BBDEFB {
 component [Load Balancer] as LB
 component [Rate Limiter] as RL
}

' ===== APPLICATION LAYER =====
rectangle \"Application Layer (Spring Boot)\" as AL #C8E6C9 {

 package \"Controllers\" as CTRL {
 [MovieController] as MC
 [BookingController] as BC
 [ShowController] as SC
 }

 package \"Services\" as SVC {
 [MovieService] as MS
 [BookingService] as BS
 }

 package \"Repositories\" as REPO {
 [JPA Repositories] as JPR
 }
}

' ===== DATA LAYER =====
rectangle \"Data Layer\" as DL #FFECB3 {
 database \"MySQL\n(Primary)\" as MYSQL
 database \"Redis\n(Cache)\" as REDIS
}

' ===== EXTERNAL SERVICES =====
rectangle \"External Services\" as ES #FFCDD2 {
 [Payment Gateway] as PG
 [Email Service] as EM
 [SMS Service] as SMS
}

' ===== CONNECTIONS =====
WEB --> LB
MOB --> LB
LB --> RL
RL --> MC
RL --> BC
RL --> SC

MC --> MS
BC --> BS
SC --> MS

MS --> JPR
BS --> JPR

JPR --> MYSQL
JPR --> REDIS

BS --> PG
BS --> EM
BS --> SMS

@enduml

",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="6vH42XDeX_oHI80BPV8k-7"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="946" width="1125" x="100" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
